summary: Verified saves prop mapping bug fix. Backend tests confirm saves prop now returns correct goalkeeper save values (avg 2-5) instead of pass_attempts (avg 20-40). All 6 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified: Whop link correct, Saves prop available in wizard, login flow works.
passed_tests: Backend: Saves prop returns reasonable values (avg 2-5, not 20-40 like pass_attempts)
Backend: pass_attempts regression test passed - still uses passes_total field
Backend: shots regression test passed - still uses shots_total field
Backend: tackles regression test passed - still uses tackles_total field
Backend: Code verification - found 3 'saves' -> 'goals_saves' mappings in server.py
Backend: Code verification - goals_saves extraction from stats.goals.saves found
Frontend: Whop link shows 'Not yet a premium member?' text
Frontend: AI Wizard flow works - League -> Player -> Opponent -> Venue -> Prop -> Line
Frontend: Saves prop available in prop selection with description 'Goalkeeper saves'
critical_code_review_comments: Bug fix verified: 'saves' -> 'goals_saves' mapping added in 3 locations (lines 819, 1037, 1300)
goals_saves extraction added: stats.get('goals', {}).get('saves') at line 810
Regression tests confirm other prop types (pass_attempts, shots, tackles) still work correctly
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_saves_mapping.py (new test file for saves mapping verification)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Saves prop mapping bug fix verified. The bug was that 'saves' prop showed pass_attempts values (28, 17, 31, 35) instead of actual saves. Fix added 'goals_saves' extraction and 'saves' -> 'goals_saves' mapping in 3 locations in server.py. Backend tests confirm saves prop now returns values in range 0-10 (typical for goalkeeper saves) instead of 20-40 (typical for pass_attempts). Whop link on login page verified correct.

saves_prop_mapping_fix.description: saves prop now correctly maps to goals_saves field, returning actual save values (0-10 range) instead of pass_attempts (20-40 range)
code_locations: server.py line 810: goals_saves extraction from stats.goals.saves

regression_tests.description: pass_attempts, shots, tackles props still work correctly with their respective fields
